# Third-Party Notices

## PDFium

This package vendors the WebAssembly build from:

- Project: `pdfium-lib`
- Release: `7623`
- Asset: `wasm.tgz`
- URL: `https://github.com/paulocoutinhox/pdfium-lib/releases/tag/7623`

The upstream PDFium project is developed by Google and used by Chromium.

PDFium's upstream license file begins with BSD-style terms for the PDFium
Authors and also includes Apache License 2.0 terms for included components.
The canonical upstream license is:

`https://pdfium.googlesource.com/pdfium/+/refs/heads/main/LICENSE`

The vendored WASM binary hash in this package is:

`14ca2adbe23b45dea57da28ae2746e376f1cddfb8e2d0b01b71dcc5cf227734e`

## Emscripten Loader

The vendored `pdfium.esm.js` loader is generated by the `pdfium-lib` build and
loaded as part of the PDFium WASM runtime.
